title: School Phone Ban
description: A school board is debating whether phones should be banned during the school day.

participants.name: Dana
participants.statement: A phone ban would help students focus and improve learning.

participants.name: Noah
participants.statement: Students need phones for safety and family emergencies.

participants.name: Mina
participants.statement: Teachers need a clear policy because enforcement is inconsistent.

participants.name: Eli
participants.statement: The school should not punish students who need accessibility tools.

participants.name: Fern
participants.statement: Parents do not trust the district to handle emergencies well.

participants.name: Theo
participants.statement: Maybe phones can be stored during class but available during lunch.
